content:
🚀 HSBC Hiring – Data Analyst (Freshers) 🚀

 Location: India
 Experience: 0 Years (Freshers Eligible)
 Expected CTC: ₹8 – ₹16 LPA (Approx.)

 Skills Required: • GCP BigQuery
• Python
• SQL
• Looker
• Power BI
• Microsoft Excel

 Key Responsibilities: 
• Analyze business and operational data
• Build reports and interactive dashboards
• Generate actionable insights from large datasets
• Support data-driven decision making
• Collaborate with business stakeholders

 Last Date to Apply: 19 June

 Apply Here:
https://lnkd.in/gX4dD-4w

 If you're looking to start your career in Data Analytics, this is a great opportunity to build experience with industry-leading tools and real-world business data.
